sections.name: End-of-Course Exam – Short-Answer Section
sections.quote: Short-Answer Section: 3 short-answer questions analyzing arguments, suggested 30 minutes, College Board scored (30% of 45%). End-of-Course Exam (45% of Score, 2 Hours Total).

sections.name: End-of-Course Exam – Essay Section
sections.quote: Essay Section: 1 long essay presenting evidence-based argument, suggested 90 minutes, College Board scored (70% of 45%). End-of-Course Exam (45% of Score, 2 Hours Total).

datasetDiscrepancies.quote: End-of-Course Exam (45% of Score, 2 Hours Total); Short-Answer suggested 30 minutes; Essay suggested 90 minutes
